did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a comparative survey and literature review of traditional and current technologies for melanoma skin cancer detection. It describes various AI/ML methods (such as ANN, CNN, SVM) and traditional image processing techniques found in other studies but does not perform any original experiments, implement any AI models, or generate new results using computational modeling itself.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
